modmenu.descriptionTranslation.hallowed: A Dark Souls-inspired death and resurrection system for Minecraft.
hallowed.restriction.generic: You cannot do that while Hallowed.
hallowed.restriction.block_break: You cannot break blocks while Hallowed.
hallowed.restriction.block_place: You cannot place blocks while Hallowed.
hallowed.restriction.container: You cannot open containers while Hallowed.
hallowed.restriction.item_use: You cannot use items while Hallowed.
hallowed.restriction.item_drop: You cannot drop items while Hallowed.
hallowed.restriction.item_pickup: You cannot pick up items while Hallowed.
hallowed.restriction.ride: You cannot ride entities while Hallowed.
hallowed.restriction.bed: You cannot use beds while Hallowed.
hallowed.restriction.weapon: You cannot attack with a weapon while Hallowed.
hallowed.restriction.hostile_only: You can only attack hostile mobs while Hallowed.
hallowed.restriction.xp: You cannot gain XP while Hallowed.
